agent_analysis.hypothesis_rationale: Nonprofits conducting larger fundraising events scale up and locate headquarters in ZIP codes with higher log real estate values (ZHVI).
agent_analysis.prior_art_notes: Bielefeld (2000) shows headquarters selection correlates with regional wealth indicators.
agent_analysis.interpretation: A statistically significant but practically negligible positive correlation was found. Event-running nonprofits are slightly associated with higher log real estate values, but the effect is practically zero.
